sanskrit:
आसुरीं योनिमापन्ना मूढा जन्मनि जन्मनि |
मामप्राप्यैव कौन्तेय ततो यान्त्यधमां गतिम् ॥
transliteration:
āsurīṁ yonim āpannā mūḍhā janmani janmani |
mām aprāpyaiva kaunteya tato yānty adhamāṁ gatim ||
literal_meaning: Entering demoniac wombs, fools birth after birth; not attaining Me, O Kaunteya, they thereafter go to the lowest state.
contextual_meaning: Destructive personality patterns become self-reinforcing loops; without conscious contact with the Self (mām aprāpya) the psyche descends into increasingly dehumanized states.
psychological_state: Chronic antisocial trajectory with ego-syntonic cruelty and absence of remorse; equivalent to ASPD with malignant features.
trigger_scenario: A high-functioning executive who repeatedly sabotages colleagues, justifies each act, and finds the mirror of conscience increasingly intolerable—eventually losing family, health, and identity.
anchor_text: Break the loop—turn inward and choose conscious connection over repeated self-destruction.
